epic.title: Phase 2+ / scale (cross-cutting placeholders)
epic.summary: Program-level capability deliberately deferred beyond v1 and not owned by a single feature PRD — the SaaS/scale layer. Tracked as placeholders so scope is visible and can be pulled forward if the business case appears. (Per-feature deferrals live as placeholder stories inside their own PRD epics.)

stories.title: Multi-location switching UI (placeholder)
stories.context: Switching between locations/clinics in one tenant. The data model is location-aware; the switching UX is deferred.
stories.i_want: to switch between locations in one place
stories.so_that: I run several clinics from one login
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 2+; data model already carries Location.

stories.title: SaaS onboarding & billing UI (placeholder)
stories.context: Self-service tenant sign-up, subscription billing and per-tenant Entra federation for selling the platform as SaaS (PRD-01 non-goal; Phase 3).
stories.i_want: to sign up for the platform myself and pay a subscription
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 3; v1 provisions tenants manually.

stories.title: Per-tenant white-label theming (placeholder)
stories.context: Per-tenant branding/theming of web and apps (PRD-01 non-goal).
stories.i_want: to brand the platform with my clinic's look
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 2+; design tokens are themeable by construction.
Captured so the design system stays token-driven.

stories.title: Public API & webhooks (placeholder)
stories.context: Outbound/inbound public API + webhooks for third parties (PRD-10 deferred; Phase 3).
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 3; internal API is OpenAPI-described already.
Captured so the API stays contract-first.

stories.title: Native POS hardware & tablet kiosk mode (placeholder)
stories.context: Native POS hardware integration and a tablet kiosk mode (PRD-06/09 non-goals).
stories.i_want: native POS hardware and a kiosk check-in mode
stories.so_that: the desk and waiting room are smoother
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 2+; v1 uses Square card-present + in-app flows.
